title: Aspidium lifuense
taxonomy: Aspidium lifuense is a species within the fern family and it is classified as follows: Aspidium lifuense is a member of the genus Aspidium, which is a part of the family Dryopteridaceae. This classification further categorizes the plant into the division Pteridophyta, also known as the fern division. The class Polypodiopsida, which is a subclass of the division Pteridophyta, is also a part of this plant's classification. At the kingdom level, Aspidium lifuense is classified as Plantae. The specific classification of Aspidium lifuense indicates its unique characteristics and place within the plant kingdom.
